contract_enforcement.policy: Runner normalized invalid model units to the declared empty-output cannot-prove contract. This preserves benchmark honesty while keeping the raw model text in raw-generation-output.json or raw-repair-output.json.

notes: The proof of size_fromPartition is incomplete due to the missing bijection between Fin (length) and the filter set. The remaining lemmas fromPartition_toPartition and toPartition_fromPartition also need detailed proofs using the sorted list and zero-padding. The visible context provides the necessary lemmas (Multiset.sort_sorted, Multiset.length_sort, Multiset.sort_eq, Multiset.sum_coe, List.Pairwise.rel_get_of_le, etc.) but the combinatorial details require additional work. The current status is set to generated because the structure is in place, but the proofs are not complete.
